overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy night in a historic New Orleans-style district (Saint Denis from Red Dead Redemption 2). The camera moves along wet cobblestone streets illuminated by warm gas lamps, transitions through covered walkways between brick buildings, and encounters a horse-drawn carriage at an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with covered sidewalks

events.description: rain intensifies and becomes visible in the warm lamplight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet cobblestone street toward a covered walkway entrance

entered.detail: two-story stone building with shuttered windows and warm interior lights
wrought iron balcony railing on the upper floor
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light
wooden support beams and roof extending over the sidewalk
storefront with large windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a historic district, with the camera moving along wet cobblestones past gas lamps. The warm glow of the lamps reflects off the wet ground as the camera approaches a covered walkway between stone buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered alley between brick buildings

events.description: turns right into narrow covered walkway with close brick walls on the right
passes a person leaning against the brick wall on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow covered alleyway with brick walls close on the right

notable_agents.action: person leaning against brick wall in the shadows, partially obscured

entered.detail: red brick wall with weathered texture and green shutters
painted red wooden door with metal hinges
decorative iron fence covering a ground-floor window

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow covered alley with brick walls on the right and historic buildings on the left. Heavy rain is visible falling beyond the awning. A person is seen leaning against the wall before the camera continues past a red door and iron window grates.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway opening into a small park square

events.description: covered walkway opens toward a small tree-lined square with a streetcar visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway as it opens toward a small square with trees and a streetcar

entered.detail: large tree with illuminated trunk visible in the square ahead
open paved area with streetcar tracks and additional lighting

segments.scene_description: The narrow alley opens up toward a small tree-lined square. The covered walkway continues, with the brick wall receding to the right and the open square becoming visible ahead. A streetcar can be seen in the distant background through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic square with streetcar tracks and horse traffic

events.description: horse-drawn carriage enters from right and crosses in front of the camera
slows slightly to allow the carriage to pass before continuing

agents.ego_description: walking past the horse-drawn carriage and continuing along the covered sidewalk

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with two horses moving from right to left across the intersection
pedestrian standing near support pole observing the street

entered.detail: A-frame wooden menu board standing on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into the open square where a horse-drawn carriage crosses from right to left. A pedestrian stands near a support pole on the right, watching the street. The camera continues along the covered walkway past an A-frame menu board, with the historic building facade now prominent on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked street into a sheltered alleyway that eventually opens into a bustling public square. It begins by gliding along wet cobblestones illuminated by the warm, reflective glow of gas lamps before transitioning under the shelter of a covered walkway between stone buildings. As the camera enters a narrow brick alley, it passes a figure leaning against the wall and moves past iron window grates while heavy rain falls just beyond the awning. The scene then expands as the alley opens toward a tree-lined square, revealing a distant streetcar through the downpour. Finally, the camera emerges into the open plaza, passing an A-frame menu board and a waiting pedestrian as a horse-drawn carriage crosses the intersection.
